text.title: AI Trust Disclosure Patterns Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the AI surface user-visible (not invisible plumbing)?

conclusion.verdict: skip; methodology applies to user-visible surfaces only

branch.question: Does the product ship in EU OR a regulated market (NY, CA-AB, UK Online Safety)?

conclusion.verdict: enforce all 5 axes; legal signoff required

branch.question: Does the brand position itself on user trust (high-stakes: finance, health, legal)?

conclusion.verdict: enforce all 5 axes voluntarily; brand risk exceeds regulatory cost
minimum viable: model identity + opt-out + error report; add citation when factual claims emerge

text.example: visible=true → q-jurisdiction: EU → all 5 axes; legal signoff required before launch.
